Title: Wire MoveToTool to read coordinates from ActionData.Context (Phase 4 adaptive)
Description:
Currently MoveToTool requires explicit x/y/z in ActionData.Arguments. The Phase 4 plan is for SearchMemoryTool to write location data to ToolResult.Data (which AgentBackgroundService carries into planContext), and MoveToTool to read from ActionData.Context when Arguments don't contain coords.

Implementation:
1. Update SearchMemoryTool to extract coordinates from the best page snippet/content when it contains 'x:', 'y:', 'z:' patterns or a structured location record.
2. Update MoveToTool.ExecuteAsync: if Arguments has x/y/z, use those; else check Context['nearestX'], Context['nearestY'], Context['nearestZ'].
3. Update HtnTaskLibrary.GatherWoodDecompose: add a MoveToTool action after SearchMemory (with no explicit coords, relying on context).
4. Add ContextCarryTests to verify the full flow.

This makes GatherWood actually navigate to where wood was found in memory.
